description: Storage Usage Status is a component that is used to read how much storage a user has used, total, shared, and that has left to share.

fields.OwnerId: The id of the user this is reading data from
fields.GroupMemberQuota: Whether to read group storage limits.
fields.HasValidData: Whether this component has successfully grabbed the data.
fields.StorageBytes: how many bytes of storage ``OwnerId`` has total
fields.FullStorageBytes: how many bytes of storage ``OwnerId`` has used currently.
fields.ShareableStorageBytes: How many bytes of storage ``OwnerId`` currently has ready to share.
fields.SharedStorageBytes: How many bytes of storage ``OwnerId`` has shared with others currently.
fields.UsageBytes: The total amount of bytes being used by ``OwnerId``.
fields.UsageRatio: the percentage of how full ``OwnerId``'s storage is from 0->1
fields.StorageString: String version with nice formatting applied of how much storage ``OwnerId`` has.
fields.FullStorageString: String version with nice formatting applied of
fields.ShareableStorageString: String version with nice formatting applied of how much storage ``OwnerId`` has ready to share.
fields.SharedStorageString: String version with nice formatting applied of how much storage ``OwnerId`` has shared with others.
fields.UsageString: String version with nice formatting applied of how much storage ``OwnerId`` has used.
fields.RatioString: String version with nice formatting applied of how full ``OwnerId``'s storage is.

usage: Can only be used in user space and your active cloud home.
